== Notes for [[Item:Q114626|Q114626]] ==

Arnaldo I, comte de Bigorre1

b. circa 950

Father Raymond I Dato, comte de Bigorre2 b. circa 929, d. after 956

Mother Faquilena d' Astarac2 b. circa 920

Charts Descendants of Charlemage

Arnaldo I, comte de Bigorre was born circa 950. He was the son of Raymond I Dato, comte de Bigorre and Faquilena d' Astarac.2

Family

Child

García Arnaldo, comte de Bigorre+ b. c 972

Citations

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 227-35.

[S1265] Genealogy.eu, online genealogy.euweb.cz, Counts of Bigorre, Ribagorza and Pailhars.

Name Prefix:<NPFX> Count Name Suffix:<NSFX> Of Bigorre

[Brøderbund WFT Vol. 2, Ed. 1, Tree #1241, Date of Import: May 8, 1997]

!COUNT OF BIGORRE

#Générale##Générale#Puîné.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
